name: Scampi
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6 to 8
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Remove shells from shrimp, leaving the shell on the tail section only.
Devein; wash under running water; drain on paper towels.
Melt butter in a 13-by-9-by-2-inch baking dish in the oven. Add salt, garlic, and 1 tablespoon parsley; mix well.
Arrange shrimp in a single layer in the baking dish. Bake, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
Turn shrimp. Sprinkle with lemon peel, lemon juice, and remaining parsley. Bake for an additional 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender.
Arrange shrimp on a heated serving platter. Pour garlic butter over all.
Garnish with lemon wedges.
